violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. Uncovered containers of food in the walk-in cooler. Should be covered to prevent potential contamination.
Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Single use items stored on the floor in the dry storage area.
Toilet facilities. — --Toilet room was not provided with sufficient mechanical ventilation. Neither of the restrooms have any mechanical ventilation.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors throughout the facility and the trim in the prep area/kitchen needs a thorough cleaning.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Missing ceiling tiles in the dry storage area over the single-use items.
Clean dry location, protected (1 pt deducted)
Clean, maintained, tissue, vented, self-closing door (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
